legacy_oauth_region.title: [DIAGNOSTIC] Home Connect Account Region
legacy_oauth_region.description: Select the region your Home Connect account is registered in.

legacy_oauth_paste.title: [DIAGNOSTIC] Legacy Sign-In
legacy_oauth_paste.description:
Open this URL in your browser and sign in: {authorize_url}

The page will fail to load afterward (that's expected) - copy the full URL from your browser's address bar and paste it below.
